basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rajkot Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 13 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rajkot (AIIMS Rajkot)
basic_details.short_information: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Rajkot Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below.

age_limit.age_details: Max 50 years for Associate Professor/Assistant Professor, Max 35 years for Tutor/Clinical Instructor. Age relaxation applicable.
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 50 years for Associate Professor/Assistant Professor and 35 years for Tutor/Clinical Instructor. Age relaxation is applicable as per rules: SC/ST: 5 years; OBC-NCL: 3 years; PwBD: 10 years; Central/State Govt. employees & AIIMS employees (with 3+ years service): 5 years; Ex-Servicemen: 5 years.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. Nursing, B.Sc. Nursing, Post B.Sc. Nursing, Registered Nurse & Midwife
qualification.details: Associate Professor (Reader) in Nursing: M.Sc. Nursing + Registered Nurse & Midwife + 8 years experience after M.Sc. (including 5 years teaching). Desirable: Ph.D. Assistant Professor / Lecturer in Nursing: M.Sc. Nursing + Registered Nurse & Midwife + 5 years experience (min. 2 years teaching). Tutor / Clinical Instructor: B.Sc. Nursing / Post B.Sc. Nursing + Registered Nurse/Midwife + 3 years teaching experience. Desirable: M.Sc. Nursing

salary_details.details: Associate Professor (Reader) in Nursing: Level-12 (7th CPC) Assistant Professor / Lecturer in Nursing: Level-11 (7th CPC) Tutor / Clinical Instructor: Level-10 (7th CPC)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Rajkot to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Rajkot Nursing Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the AIIMS Rajkot Nursing Faculty recruitment is 12 June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Nursing Faculty at AIIMS Rajkot?
faq.answer: There are a total of 13 vacancies for Nursing Faculty positions at AIIMS Rajkot. These vacancies are distributed across different roles such as Associate Professor, Assistant Professor, and Tutor/Clinical Instructor.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Tutor/Clinical Instructor post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Tutor/Clinical Instructor post is B.Sc. Nursing or Post B.Sc. Nursing, along with being a Registered Nurse/Midwife and possessing 3 years of teaching experience. M.Sc. Nursing is desirable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 500/-. SC/ST category candidates are exempted from paying any application fee for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Associate Professor post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Associate Professor post is 50 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for AIIMS Rajkot Nursing Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for AIIMS Rajkot Nursing Faculty recruitment involves a Computer Based Screening Test (CBT) followed by an Interview. Candidates need to qualify in both stages to be considered for the final selection.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Assistant Professor/Lecturer in Nursing post is as per Level-11 (7th CPC). This indicates a competitive remuneration package as per the central government pay matrix.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Gujarat apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The notification mentions that applications are invited from eligible candidates in Gujarat. However, it is advisable to check the detailed official notification for any specific domicile requirements or eligibility criteria for candidates from other states.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for the AIIMS Rajkot Nursing Faculty recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official website or the provided application link to submit their forms.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided below. It is highly recommended to read the notification thoroughly before applying for any post.
